description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a predominantly white and gray exterior. The structure is composed of multiple rectangular volumes, some of which are stacked to create a two-story section, while the rest remain single-story. The front yard includes a driveway with a parked blue car, a gated entrance, and a row of tall, slender trees providing privacy. Outdoor living spaces are visible, including a patio with seating and a small pool or water feature. Large windows and sliding glass doors are distributed asymmetrically, allowing for ample natural light and a connection to the outdoors. The landscaping is simple, with a mix of paved surfaces, grass, and a few strategically placed trees and shrubs.
description: A modern, minimalist house with flat roofs, large windows, and a mix of single and double-story sections, surrounded by simple landscaping and outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, blue car, gated entrance, and tall trees lining the front yard.
description_view_1: Rear/side view highlighting the patio with outdoor seating, large windows, and a tree near the paved area.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the rear garden, more private areas, and the two-story section of the house.
description_view_3: Top-down rear view emphasizing the flat roofs, open courtyard, and overall layout of the house volumes.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Gated main entry with a modern door, no porch, flanked by tall trees and a paved driveway
